title: Lesson 15: (Kana) - Lesson 15: (Hiragana) "ぱ, ぴ, ぷ, ぺ, ぽ"

intro_cards.title: Handakuten (゜)
intro_cards.body:
The small circle (゜) is called handakuten (or 'maru'). It changes the は row sounds to 'p':

は → ぱ (ha → pa)
ひ → ぴ (hi → pi)
ふ → ぷ (fu → pu)
へ → ぺ (he → pe)
ほ → ぽ (ho → po)

Handakuten only applies to the は row — no other characters use it.
